writing.title: Writing Task 1: Make uncertain predictions
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) making uncertain predictions, using might/could.
writing.sampleAnswer: It might rain later, so take an umbrella. She could be at home now. We might not finish the project on time. The price could increase next month.
checklist: Dùng might hoặc could cho khả năng không chắc chắn
Có ít nhất 1 câu phủ định (might not)
Mô tả được tình huống cụ thể

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe your wishes and decisions
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing your wishes and decisions, using verb + to-infinitive (want/decide/hope/plan...).
writing.sampleAnswer: I want to learn a new language this year. I decided to study a little every day. I hope to see good results soon.
checklist: Dùng ít nhất 2 động từ + to-infinitive khác nhau
Thể hiện được mong muốn/quyết định rõ ràng
